ValidationRule.description: The validation rule ensures that when the Training Stage is set to "Not Trained" and the Not Trained Reason is "Other", the user must provide a comment in the Not Trained Comments field.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Validation_Rules), $Profile.Name != 'Trainer Login Based', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training', ISPICKVAL(Training_Stage__c, "Not Trained"), ISPICKVAL(Not_Trained_Reason__c, "Other"), ISBLANK(Not_Trained_Comments__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please describe the reason the customer was not trained.
